EatingMessages: I should find more food before moving on.
That tasted awful, but it will keep me alive.
DrinkingMessages: I should refill before I leave.
Clean water is worth more than ammo out here.
UnsafeDrinkingMessages: I hope that water was clean.
My stomach turns after drinking that.
I should have purified it first.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
UnjamMessages: This weapon is going to get me killed.
I need to maintain this gun.
That could have been the end of me.
UnjamSuccessMessages: The world keeps finding new ways to test me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
SkinningAnimalMessages: I should cook this before moving on.
SkinningHumanMessages: I should not think about what I am doing.
There is no going back from this.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BandagingMessages: I need to stop the bleeding.
I cannot afford to lose more blood.
BandageSuccessMessages: I need to be more careful.
The world keeps finding new ways to test me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
FireStartingMessages: A fire would change everything right now.
CookingMessages: Hot food might keep me going.
A warm meal feels rare now.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
FishingMessages: Food from the water is safer than the towns.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
RepairMessages: Better than letting it fall apart.
I need to take care of my gear.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MedicineConsumeMessages: This better be the right medicine.
Medicine is worth more than ammunition right now.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
WoundCareActionMessages: Patch it now or pay for it later.
Breathe. One wound at a time.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
InjectionMessages: Needle in. Do not think about it.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BloodMedicalMessages: I need to trust this blood.
This could save a life, or end one.
Blood and saline are hope in a bag.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
DisinfectActionMessages: Clean it before it turns bad.
This sting is better than infection.
I need to keep this from getting worse.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
RestrainActionMessages: This is not a good situation.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
CraftingActionMessages: Make do with what is left.
If it holds, it is good enough.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
DeployActionMessages: This place will have to do.
Set it down and keep watch.
I should not stay exposed for long.
Placement matters. Escape routes matter more.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
GardeningActionMessages: If this grows, it might save me later.
A garden is hope, if nobody finds it first.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ResourceGatheringMessages: Useful materials are worth the noise.
Take what I need and move.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
LiquidTransferMessages: Water, fuel, blood. Everything has value now.
I should check what I am carrying.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
FireplaceActionMessages: A fire is comfort and a signal.
This could keep me alive tonight.
I need warmth, but I need caution too.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
ElectronicsActionMessages: If this still works, it could matter.
Light and noise can save me or expose me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
NavigationActionMessages: Know where I am before moving.
A wrong turn can kill as surely as a bullet.
I need a plan, not panic.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
LockActionMessages: This might keep something safe, or keep me out.
Take the time. Watch the area.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
TrapExplosiveMessages: Careful. One mistake here is final.
This kind of work gets people killed.
Do not rush explosives or traps.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BaseBuildingActionMessages: Build it strong or do not build it at all.
Every wall is a promise and a target.
This might hold for a while.
A base is never truly safe.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
VehicleActionMessages: If this runs, everyone nearby will know.
Vehicles solve problems and create new ones.
Check it twice before trusting it.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
BuryStashMessages: The ground keeps secrets until it does not.
A stash is only safe if nobody sees me make it.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
PersonalCareMessages: It is easy to forget being human.
Take care of the body that carries me.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
AmmoManagementMessages: Load it now, need it later.
Do not fumble this when it counts.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
OpenCloseActionMessages: Check the corners before moving through.
Every door could have someone behind it.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
GeneralActionMessages: I should remember this if I live long enough.
InventoryActionMessages: Everything I carry should earn its weight.
Pack it so I can survive with it.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
MovementActionMessages: I should remember this if I live long enough.
WorldInteractionMessages: This place still has systems buried in it.
I should be ready for what this changes.
I should remember this if I live long enough.
